title: wolfhsm-src: silent skip of missing C files hides broken builds
description: build.rs loops over C file lists and does 'if path.exists() { build.file(&path) }'. If a file is missing (e.g. wolfHSM version bump renames a file), the build silently succeeds with an incomplete library. Missing functionality only discovered at runtime. Fix: remove the exists() guard; let cc::Build fail loudly if a listed file is absent. Add cargo:rerun-if-changed for each source file.
